case_title: ASSET ACCEPTANCE, LLC VS. FRANK CHOW et al

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION RE VENUE FILED BY PLAINTIFF ASSET ACCEPTANCE, LLC
STIPULATION FOR ENTRY OF JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF ASSET ACCEPTANCE, LLC ALSO FILED BY DEFENDANT CHOW, FRANK
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE RE DISMISSAL PURSUANT TO CRC 3.1385 SET FOR SEP-13-2011 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT. 212. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

STIPULATION FOR JUDGMENT FILED; THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING STIPULATED JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF ASSET ACCEPTANCE, LLC RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CHOW, FRANK $2,626.79 PRINCIPAL, $400.00 ATTORNEY FEES, $385.87 INTEREST, $440.00 COSTS, $1,050.00 CREDIT, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,802.66, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT AND AFFIDAVIT OF MAILING FILED
CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF SEP-13-2011 IS OFF CALENDAR. JUDGMENT ON FILE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
